$comment: Maps academy doc sections to the monorepo packages they are responsible for documenting. Used by ph-lora to scope code↔doc consistency checks. Update this file when new packages are added or doc ownership changes. `packages` is used by Tier 2 (change-detection prefix match). `sourceFiles` is used by Tier 3 agents to load only the relevant source — a path ending in .ts is a single file; a path without extension is a directory (load all .ts files inside it). Keep sourceFiles tight: the tighter the list, the cheaper the Tier 3 run.

sections.label: Get Started
sections.checkFocus: CLI commands (ph init, ph install, ph add, ph generate and its subcommands), package install steps, generated project structure

sections.label: Mastery Track — Builder Environment
sections.checkFocus: Vetra Studio setup steps, CLI prerequisites, ph-cmd version requirements

sections.label: Mastery Track — Document Model Creation
sections.checkFocus: Document model schema format, codegen output shape, reducer function signatures, generated file paths

sections.label: Mastery Track — Building User Experiences
sections.checkFocus: React hooks API, editor component props, drive-app interfaces, CSS customization surface

sections.label: Mastery Track — Work With Data
sections.checkFocus: Processor interface, subgraph API, analytics engine query syntax, GraphQL schema shape

sections.label: Mastery Track — Launch
sections.checkFocus: Deploy commands, Docker image names, environment variable names, switchboard config format

sections.label: Example Use Cases
sections.checkFocus: End-to-end tutorial steps, generated file names, reducer signatures, editor component API

sections.label: API References — Powerhouse CLI
sections.checkFocus: Every documented command, flag, and argument against actual CLI help output

sections.label: API References — React Hooks
sections.checkFocus: Hook names, parameter types, return types — compare docs against exported TypeScript signatures

sections.label: API References — Reactor Client
sections.checkFocus: IReactorClient interface methods, parameter and return types

sections.label: API References — Relational Database
sections.checkFocus: Relational DB helper API, query types, hook signatures

sections.label: API References — Renown SDK
sections.checkFocus: SDK method names, auth flow steps, hook and component exports

sections.label: API References — Migration Guides
sections.checkFocus: Breaking change descriptions, before/after code samples, removed or renamed exports

sections.label: Component Library
sections.checkFocus: Component names, scalar types, prop interfaces

sections.label: Architecture
sections.checkFocus: Conceptual only — skip mechanical checks. Flag if referenced package names or system names no longer match reality.

$unmappedNote: These packages exist in the monorepo but have no doc section currently responsible for them. ph-lora should flag these as documentation gaps.
